items.name_en: New In Stock 🅰️🅰️ CE New Camille 16 Soft
items.name_cn:
New In Stock 🅰️🅰️ CE New Camille 16 Soft
CE Camille new arrival quietly returns to a minimalist elegant style. You can see this from the latest member of the 16 Soft series, the Camille 16 Soft bag. This new design retains the series' signature soft lines and outlines a casual composure with a Hobo silhouette, showing this isn't a bag trying to attract attention, but capturing hearts with low-key charm.
The Camille 16 Soft uses smooth calfskin with a natural sheen. The overall shape is fluid yet structured. The front features the brand's classic 16 metal lock detail. Without excessive decoration, it perfectly showcases taste. Camille 16 Soft comes in Medium and Small sizes. Colors range from steady black and classic tan to warm white and light sand. Every tone echoes the brand's commitment to eternal aesthetics. Just casually holding it gives an effortless chic look.
Can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody. Rotating lock closure.
1 main compartment, 1 interior zip pocket.
Includes 1 removable shoulder strap and 1 removable adjustable long strap.
Model: 120693
Color: Black
Size: 24.5x21.5x5cm
(with original packaging)

items.name_en: Large
items.name_cn:
Large
Monogram Latest Trend Origami Magic Bag
Classic monogram paired with dark brown calfskin, full of a premium feel. Eight hidden magnetic closures allow the handbag to cleverly transform into a tote bag or fold into an Origami (origami) style bucket bag. A bag for two ways to carry is amazing! Transformable tote, transformable bucket~ There are three sizes to meet our different needs for bag capacity. The more you look, the more you like it.
Large model: 0894. 32.5cmx32.5cmx27.5cm

items.name_en: Monogram
items.name_cn:
Monogram
Latest Monogram Boston 365 Boston bag is here!
In this season's collaboration with Milan designer Stefano Pilati, my favorite bag is this one. Fully enclosed magnetic opening, practical and private, suitable for daily commuting, travel, sports, and all occasions.
I have to say this bag is really spacious, with super strong practicality!
Model: Pillow bag Monogram

items.name_en: Toujours Vertical Medium, the exclusive 'market bag', is simply beautiful. A high-appeal bag that effortlessly exudes sophistication. Featuring an oversized quilted design paired with classic lettering accessories, it offers a modern and stylish look. The bag structure is very soft, and the calfskin material feels premium. The unique buckle fastening allows the sides to fold when closed. It comes with a long shoulder strap, scoring full marks for practicality and capacity, easily holding all daily essentials.

items.name_en: Dior 1:1 Counter Authentic Top-Grade Imported Factory Embroidery (D-Journey) Monogram Fabric. This D-Journey Handbag is a new arrival for the season, debuting at the Dior 2025 Spring/Summer Ready-to-Wear show. It features a soft texture and a modern reinterpretation of the dumpling bag silhouette. Crafted from blue denim calfskin, it is accented with flat oversized diagonal quilting, reinterpreting Dior's classic pattern. The main compartment features a zip pocket, and two side pockets with large leather zip pulls, each adorned with a vintage gold-finish metal Christian Dior Paris logo, making it easy to store various small daily items. The small size comes with an adjustable top handle and leather shoulder strap, allowing for hand carrying, shoulder carrying, or crossbody wear, making it an ideal choice for daily styling.

items.name_en: Dior 1:1 Counter Authentic Top-tier Imported Original Cowhide Suede (D-Journey) Black
items.name_cn:
Dior 1:1 Counter Authentic Top-tier Imported Original Cowhide Suede (D-Journey) Black
This D-Journey handbag is a new arrival for the season, debuting at the Dior 2025 Spring/Summer Couture Show. It features a soft texture and a modern reinterpretation of the dumpling bag silhouette. Crafted from suede cowhide, it is embellished with flat oversized woven trim stitching, reinterpreting Dior's classic pattern. The main compartment includes a zip pocket, and two side pockets with large leather zip pulls, adorned with a vintage gold-finished metal Christian Dior Paris logo, making it convenient for storing various daily small items. The small size comes with an adjustable top handle and leather shoulder strap, allowing for hand-carry, shoulder carry, or crossbody wear, making it an ideal choice for daily styling.
Model No. 2416
Dimensions: 23 x 14 x 16 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_en: Bottega Veneta 2025 New Arrival
items.name_cn:
Bottega Veneta 2025 New Arrival
PINACOTECA bag, iconic weaving craftsmanship, crafted with 10mm Intrecciato technique, featuring suede lining. Four leather strips add personality and stability. Relaxed and refined, reversible design, shoulder carry or hand carry.
Four ties can be adjusted into different shapes, dual-use for versatile switching, easily blending into your daily rhythm.
Model No.: 817166
Dimensions: 43*23*17.5cm

items.name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA 2025 New Arrival pinacoteca features ultra-soft leather, weaving functionality, practicality, and a relaxed chic vibe❤️‍🔥 Highly recommended for daily essentials. The size perfectly meets the commuting needs of city women—smartphone, keys, lipstick, compact powder, sunscreen, shopping bags... it fits it all!!!🔥 The capacity is impressive~ Suitable for everyone, any outfit, and any occasion. The elegant curved silhouette, exquisite woven texture, refined stitching, and rounded handles make this woven basket bag truly 'stylish yet practical, chic yet effortless'~ Any fashion lovers interested?
